evidence.observed: temperature=1.6 (default) causes non-deterministic arithmetic; agent estimates totals instead of computing exactly

findings.root_cause: temperature set to 1.6 makes the LLM inconsistent on exact integer arithmetic (floor division for discounts)
findings.suggested_fix: temperature=0.2 in config.json; self_consistency=2; explicit formula in prompt.txt

evidence.observed: redact_pii=false (default); agent echoes customer email and phone from the system prompt instruction to 'Help the customer'

findings.root_cause: no PII redaction in config, and original prompt.txt did not instruct the agent to suppress customer contact info
findings.suggested_fix: redact_pii=true in config.json; 'Never repeat customer email or phone' rule in prompt.txt; redact() in wrapper.py

evidence.observed: tool_budget=0 (unlimited) and original prompt had no tool economy rule; agent calls the same tool multiple times

findings.root_cause: no tool call limit and prompt encouraged 'checking' without bounding repetitions
findings.suggested_fix: tool_budget=4 in config.json; 'each tool at most once' rule in prompt.txt

evidence.observed: loop_guard=false and max_steps=12 (default); agent can repeat identical tool calls until max_steps

findings.root_cause: loop detection disabled; agent has no guard against cycling on the same tool action

evidence.observed: tool_error_rate=0.18 (18% of tool calls fail by design) with retry.enabled=false and max_attempts=1

findings.root_cause: high injected tool error rate with no retry mechanism causes ~18% of requests to fail outright
findings.suggested_fix: retry.enabled=true, max_attempts=3, backoff_ms=300 in config.json; wrapper retry on non-ok status

evidence.observed: model_price_tier=premium, verbose_system=true (large system message), context_size=8, max_completion_tokens=2000

findings.root_cause: premium tier pricing combined with verbose system messages and large context window inflates token usage per request

evidence.observed: normalize_unicode=false causes diacritic city names (e.g. 'Hà Nội') to fail tool lookup; catalog_override injects fake out-of-stock for 'macbook'

findings.root_cause: Unicode not normalized before passing to tools; catalog override injects false inventory data

evidence.observed: session_drift_rate=0.06 introduces drift over turns; context_reset_every=0 means sessions never reset

findings.root_cause: drift accumulates over long sessions with no reset mechanism, degrading answer quality in later turns
findings.suggested_fix: session_drift_rate=0.0; context_reset_every=5 in config.json; wrapper logs DRIFT_SIGNAL at turn_index>=3

evidence.observed: original prompt 'Help the customer and give a total in VND' gives no grounding rule; agent invents totals for out-of-stock or unknown items

findings.root_cause: no instruction to use ONLY tool data; no instruction to refuse when item is unavailable
findings.suggested_fix: rewrite prompt.txt with explicit grounding rule and refusal condition

evidence.observed: cache.enabled=false means identical questions always hit the LLM; timeout_ms=0 allows unbounded latency

findings.root_cause: no caching for repeated questions and no timeout cap create long-tail latency spikes
findings.suggested_fix: cache.enabled=true; timeout_ms=15000; thread-safe cache in wrapper.py
